default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Webstacks and GrowthX to discuss performance, keyword analysis, and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/mdNRTXi34sCCBv3JEgrsQxQApKr5xnyc?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [21% traffic growth week-over-week; refreshed articles showing positive click/impression changes](https://fathom.video/share/mdNRTXi34sCCBv3JEgrsQxQApKr5xnyc?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Keyword gap analysis revealed opportunities in branding/web design topics](https://fathom.video/share/mdNRTXi34sCCBv3JEgrsQxQApKr5xnyc?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [Webstacks is reorganizing content themes and keywords to align with capabilities pages](https://fathom.video/share/mdNRTXi34sCCBv3JEgrsQxQApKr5xnyc?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Focus on website migration content as a priority, with plans to improve existing and create new content](https://fathom.video/share/mdNRTXi34sCCBv3JEgrsQxQApKr5xnyc?tab=summary&timestamp=533.0)

## Topics

### Performance Update

  - [21% traffic growth week-over-week in week 14](https://fathom.video/share/mdNRTXi34sCCBv3JEgrsQxQApKr5xnyc?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Six refreshed articles from March showing positive click and impression changes](https://fathom.video/share/mdNRTXi34sCCBv3JEgrsQxQApKr5xnyc?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [Some articles lost positions, but main purpose was to improve quality and add conversion panels](https://fathom.video/share/mdNRTXi34sCCBv3JEgrsQxQApKr5xnyc?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [New 6-week SEO test started for CMS comparison updates](https://fathom.video/share/mdNRTXi34sCCBv3JEgrsQxQApKr5xnyc?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Keyword Gap Analysis

  - [Analysis of top competitors' keywords grouped by URLs in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/mdNRTXi34sCCBv3JEgrsQxQApKr5xnyc?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Many branding and web design keywords identified as potential opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/mdNRTXi34sCCBv3JEgrsQxQApKr5xnyc?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Aligns well with Webstacks' strong performance in product page designs](https://fathom.video/share/mdNRTXi34sCCBv3JEgrsQxQApKr5xnyc?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [Some B2B-focused keywords rejected from consideration](https://fathom.video/share/mdNRTXi34sCCBv3JEgrsQxQApKr5xnyc?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)

### Content Strategy Reorganization

  - [Webstacks categorizing keywords and blogs by themes (e.g., industries, web design)](https://fathom.video/share/mdNRTXi34sCCBv3JEgrsQxQApKr5xnyc?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Aiming to shift focus towards utilizing capability pages for bottom-of-funnel searches](https://fathom.video/share/mdNRTXi34sCCBv3JEgrsQxQApKr5xnyc?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
  - [Creating content pillars that easily link back to capability pages](https://fathom.video/share/mdNRTXi34sCCBv3JEgrsQxQApKr5xnyc?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Goal: Identify target keywords and expand content in structured approach](https://fathom.video/share/mdNRTXi34sCCBv3JEgrsQxQApKr5xnyc?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)

### Website Migration Focus

  - [Prioritizing website migration content due to recent high-quality leads from ad campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/mdNRTXi34sCCBv3JEgrsQxQApKr5xnyc?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
  - [Opportunities identified: integrations migration, content migration, SEO migration, asset migration](https://fathom.video/share/mdNRTXi34sCCBv3JEgrsQxQApKr5xnyc?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Plan to improve rankings on existing high-intent keywords and explore new areas](https://fathom.video/share/mdNRTXi34sCCBv3JEgrsQxQApKr5xnyc?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)

### Programmatic SEO Update

  - [Discussed potential for expanded work stream on programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/mdNRTXi34sCCBv3JEgrsQxQApKr5xnyc?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
  - [Kyle (from GrowthX) suggested possibility of a 3-month pilot project](https://fathom.video/share/mdNRTXi34sCCBv3JEgrsQxQApKr5xnyc?tab=summary&timestamp=1711.0)
  - [Webstacks interested in understanding how GrowthX can best help with design execution, development, and content management](https://fathom.video/share/mdNRTXi34sCCBv3JEgrsQxQApKr5xnyc?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
